reviews.comment:
Pare por un café. Estaba quemado e hirviendo, no pude tomarlo por media hora. Me cobraron café doble y me dieron uno chico.

(Translated by Google)
I stopped for a coffee. It was burnt and boiling hot; I couldn't drink it for half an hour. They charged me for a double coffee and gave me a small one.

reviews.comment:
Estación más o menos potable. Baño minimamente aceptable que podrian mejorar mil veces. Mercado sin mucha variedad de productos. Por ser del ACA, bastante flojo.

(Translated by Google)
The station is more or less passable. The bathroom is minimally acceptable, but they could improve it a thousand times over. The market doesn't have much variety. For an ACA station, it's pretty disappointing.
